included_categories: Positive test cases for account creation with valid email and password
Negative test cases for account creation with invalid data
Validation test cases for email uniqueness and password length
Boundary test cases for password length (minimum 8 characters)
Business rule test cases for email uniqueness and password length
Security test cases for race condition on email uniqueness (concurrent account creation)

excluded_categories.reason: No authentication, roles, or permission requirements are specified in the requirement analysis.
No UI behavior, messages, loading states, or empty states are described in the requirement analysis.
No dependencies (e.g., external services, APIs, databases) are explicitly identified in the requirement analysis.
No network-related requirements (e.g., offline mode, latency, retry) are specified.
No localization or internationalization requirements are mentioned.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive test cases for successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length.
Generate negative test cases for account creation with duplicate email (violating BR001).
Generate negative test cases for account creation with password less than 8 characters (violating BR002).
Generate boundary test cases for password length exactly 8 characters and 7 characters.
Generate validation test cases to verify email uniqueness check before account creation (VAL001).
Generate validation test cases to verify password length validation (VAL002).
Generate security test cases for race condition during concurrent account creation with the same email (RISK001).
Do not generate test cases for password complexity beyond minimum length (e.g., uppercase, digits, special characters) as it is not specified.
Do not generate test cases for email format validation as rules are not specified.
Do not generate test cases for account verification or confirmation process as it is not described.
Do not generate test cases for error messages or user feedback as they are not defined.
Do not generate test cases for additional fields (e.g., name, phone) as they are not required.
Do not generate test cases for maximum length of email or password as limits are not specified.
Do not generate test cases for password storage security (hashing) as it is not mentioned.
